maize.buy_note: Safe emergency food purchase if the estate is short.
maize.sell_note: Low-profit sale unless the estate has true surplus.
maize.rival_note: All houses watch maize during drought or population pressure.

wood.rival_note: Cunning and Diplomatic houses buy wood for early building chains.

cotton.buy_note: Feeds cloth and fine textile chains.
cotton.sell_note: Useful sale only if the estate does not need cloth soon.
cotton.rival_note: Diplomatic Rival wants cotton for fine textiles.

cloth.buy_note: Important for upkeep, buildings and palace goods.
cloth.sell_note: Sell only if it is genuine surplus.
cloth.rival_note: Cunning Rival can pressure cloth as a practical bottleneck.

tools.buy_note: Tools prevent construction and production paralysis.
tools.sell_note: Useful sale only once reserves are safe.
tools.rival_note: Cunning Rival hoards and manipulates tool supply.

obsidian.sell_note: Not high value while abundant, but war demand can change quickly.
obsidian.rival_note: War Rival wants obsidian for weapons.

weapons.buy_note: Buy only for urgent warrior or Flower Wars needs.
weapons.sell_note: Very profitable if the estate can spare them, but dangerous.

ritual_goods.sell_note: Good sale if not needed for favour.
ritual_goods.rival_note: Diplomatic and Cunning houses may pressure ritual supply.

cacao.sell_note: Profitable but politically useful to keep.
cacao.rival_note: Diplomatic Rival wants cacao for court/status production.

fine_textiles.sell_note: Highly profitable if produced, but usually needed for recognition.
fine_textiles.rival_note: Diplomatic Rival should chase fine textiles early.
